summary: Frontend-only iteration 2 testing of SMPN 1 Sumber Jaya redesigned landing page (soft palette + 3 new sections: PPDB, News, Achievements). All 16 testable items passed including the CRITICAL Sonner toast trigger on PPDB download button. Zero console errors. All data-testid attributes present, fonts (Fraunces + Plus Jakarta Sans) loaded correctly, anchor scrolls work, mobile responsive menu functions properly.
critical_code_review_comments: PPDB.js line 108: Tailwind class `${tone.text}/70` is interpolated dynamically (e.g. `text-coral-700/70`) — Tailwind JIT may not detect dynamic opacity-suffixed classes from string interpolation. Verify the lighter month label opacity actually renders; if not, switch to a static map. Visually month text appears, so likely safe but risky pattern.
Navbar uses `bg-cream-50/85` and other dynamic-looking classes that should be safelisted; works currently but worth auditing tailwind.config safelist for production purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing page only — no backend integration. PPDB Sonner toast verified working with exact text 'Formulir PPDB sedang diunduh'. All sections (Navbar, Hero, About, Stats, VisiMisi, Programs, PPDB, News, Achievements, Footer) render. Anchors #tentang #program #ppdb #berita #prestasi all scroll correctly. Mobile menu toggle at viewport 390x844 works. Fonts loaded: Fraunces (heading), Plus Jakarta Sans (body).

verification_details.navbar_links: All 5 nav-link-* testids present + nav-cta-ppdb + nav-mobile-toggle
verification_details.ppdb_section: ppdb-section, ppdb-heading, ppdb-timeline (4 items), ppdb-requirements (6 items), ppdb-download-card, ppdb-download-btn all present
verification_details.ppdb_download_toast: PASS — Sonner toast 'Formulir PPDB sedang diunduh' with description 'Lengkapi dan kirim kembali ke sekolah. Butuh bantuan? Hubungi (0723) 465335.' appeared on click (verified via [data-sonner-toast] DOM and screenshot)
verification_details.news_section: PASS — featured 'PPDB 2026/2027 Resmi Dibuka' headline visible
verification_details.achievements_section: PASS — 'Lomba Tari Kreasi Tradisional' featured + tally '47' present
verification_details.stats_count_up: PASS — value 634 rendered after IntersectionObserver triggered
verification_details.hero_pill_floating_cards: PASS — 'PPDB 2026', '1985', and Hero floating cards (46 Guru, Ekstrakurikuler, Sejak 1985) all present in DOM (text split across spans)
verification_details.fonts: Fraunces, Georgia, serif (heading) | Plus Jakarta Sans (body) — confirmed via getComputedStyle
verification_details.anchors: #tentang #program #ppdb #berita #prestasi all exist; clicking nav-link-ppdb scrolls section into viewport
verification_details.mobile_responsive: Mobile toggle visible at 390x844, menu opens with [data-testid=nav-mobile-menu] containing all links + Daftar PPDB CTA
